summary: Associate maestro-flow resources with the Pi package, add Pi-native AGENTS guidance, and inject available teammate models into the system prompt.
approach: Declare the published maestro-flow version as a runtime dependency and discover its packaged .agents skills through Pi's resources_discover hook.
Create a Pi AGENTS.md based on the Maestro Claude instructions, replacing delegate CLI guidance with direct teammate calls.
Snapshot authenticated models on session_start and append a deterministic model catalog through before_agent_start, refreshing when the registry changes.
Prove top-level and per-task model propagation plus package/resource behavior with focused tests.

confidence.degradation_event: Wave 1 instruction/model explorer and Wave 2 planner timed out; local Pi source evidence and two completed exploration results were used.
confidence.boundary_warning: packages/pi-maestro-flow/package.json and README.md already contain user changes; edits must be additive.

warnings: Do not publish an absolute D:\maestro2 dependency path.
Do not overwrite existing approval-mode, skill-runtime, or README worktree changes.
